lines.speaker: Oneiromancer
lines.text: Hello there. What do you want to talk about?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi, how are things going?

lines.speaker: Oneiromancer
lines.text: Well hopefully a lot better now that you've initiated the calm between the Moon Clan and the Fremenniks. Remember, if you want to use our Lunar Spells at any time, pray at the altar beside me and you can modify

lines.speaker: Oneiromancer
lines.text: your knowledge!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've misplaced my staff.

lines.speaker: Oneiromancer
lines.text: I knew you'd do that, and I used my magic to teleport it back to me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Erm, that doesn't sound too realistic. Thanks!

lines.speaker: Oneiromancer
lines.text: Look, do you want it or not?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, yes. Yes please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I'll have to come back when I have a space to carry one.

lines.speaker: Oneiromancer
lines.text: But it's going to cost you! It will be 30000 coins!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah, I'll pay that!

lines.speaker: Oneiromancer
lines.text: Sorry dear, you don't have enough coins for that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, ok...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've lost my Lunar [item].

lines.speaker: Oneiromancer
lines.text: Oh dear, good job I pre-empted you!

lines.speaker: Oneiromancer
lines.text: I already knew that. I got one especially.

lines.speaker: Oneiromancer
lines.text: Well of course, I know that already, so I got a backup for you.

lines.speaker: Oneiromancer
lines.text: I know. Good job I knew you would drop it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Unfortunately I don't have space to carry it.

lines.speaker: Oneiromancer
lines.text: But it's going to cost you! It will be [number] coins!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah, I'll pay that!

lines.speaker: Oneiromancer
lines.text: Sorry dear, you don't have enough coins for that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, ok...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again. Seen Cyrisus recently?

lines.speaker: Oneiromancer
lines.text: As you mention it, yes. He wanted to create more astral runes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Interesting.

lines.speaker: Oneiromancer
lines.text: He said something about fighting kalphites, whatever they are.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds like his fear of combat really is a problem of the past!

lines.speaker: Oneiromancer
lines.text: You've done well. Very well.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Oneiromancer
lines.text: Hello there. I hear that Cyrisus is no longer with us.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: He died fighting for a good cause. He'll be remembered as a great hero.

lines.speaker: Oneiromancer
lines.text: I suppose the good do die young.

lines.speaker: Oneiromancer
lines.text: Well done.

lines.speaker: Oneiromancer
lines.text: Answer this, please.
